commit_message:
Cell renaming for gate level netlist simulation Cell renaming for gate level netlist simulation Hi all,


This PR (tries to) improve gate-level netlist simulation in two ways:
- It adds the `_func` suffix to all functional verilog models, because they are referenced in the behavioral model that way. A functional simulation should still be possible with the normal naming scheme by using the behavioral verilog files and defining `FUNCTIONAL`.
- All sequential cells contain an udp primitve. Th
